{{Infobox character
| name = Oleana
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] fights in a makeshift [[arena]] made out of an [[Imperial Palace basement]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] is a [[Champion]] who prefers to start battles by giving her opponents a choice of weapon while she fights bare-handed.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] has Palace rooms.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Oleana]] was born near the docks.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
